title: Szechuan Dry Poached Entree
description: A salty and crunchy Indian-inspired dish featuring Sichuan peppercorns and shaoxing wine, ideal for a weeknight meal that is low-sodium friendly.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Rinse chicken and pat dry.
Mix soy sauce, ground cumin, sichuan peppercorns, garlic, shaoxing wine, and oil in a bowl. Marinate chicken for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Drain marinade from chicken and discard. Pat chicken dry again and place on baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in preheated oven for about 25-30 minutes, until internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
While chicken is cooking, mix lime juice into marinade to create a sauce. Reduce heat to low and simmer sauce until slightly thickened.
Slice cooked chicken thinly on an angle and serve with sauce drizzled over top.
